pg112-p1:
read this book or at least the chapter on alcoholism. Tell him you have been worried, though perhaps needlessly. You
think he ought to know the subject better, as everyone should have a clear understanding of the risk he takes if he
drinks too much. Show him you have confidence in his power to stop or moderate. Say you do not want to be a wet blanket;
that you only want him to take care of his health. Thus you may succeed in interesting him in alcoholism.
pg112-p2-s1: He probably has several alcoholics among his own acquaintances.
pg112-p2-s2:
You might suggest that you both take an interest in
them.
pg112-p2-s3: Drinkers like to help other drinkers.
pg112-p2-s4: Your husband may be willing to talk to one of them.
pg112-p2:
He probably has several alcoholics among his own acquaintances. You might suggest that you both take an interest in
them. Drinkers like to help other drinkers. Your husband may be willing to talk to one of them.
pg112-p3-s1:
If this kind of approach does not catch your husband's interest, it may be best to drop the subject, but after a
friendly talk your husband will usually revive the topic himself.
pg112-p3-s2:
This may take patient waiting, but it will be worth
it.
pg112-p3-s3: Meanwhile you might try to help the wife of another serious drinker.
pg112-p3-s4:
If you act upon these principles, your husband
may stop or moderate.
pg112-p3:
If this kind of approach does not catch your husband's interest, it may be best to drop the subject, but after a
friendly talk your husband will usually revive the topic himself. This may take patient waiting, but it will be worth
it. Meanwhile you might try to help the wife of another serious drinker. If you act upon these principles, your husband
may stop or moderate.
pg112-p4-s1: Suppose, however, that your husband fits the description of number two.
pg112-p4-s2:
The same principles which apply to husband
number one should be practiced.
pg112-p4-s3: But after his next binge, ask him if he would really like to get over drinking for good.
pg112-p4-s4: Do not ask that he do it for you or anyone else.
pg112-p4:
Suppose, however, that your husband fits the description of number two. The same principles which apply to husband
number one should be practiced. But after his next binge, ask him if he would really like to get over drinking for good. Do not ask that he do it for you or anyone else. Just would he like to?
pg112-p5-s2: Show him your copy of this book and tell him what you have found out about alcoholism.
pg112-p5-s3:
Show
him that as alcoholics, the writers of the book understand.
pg112-p5-s4: Tell him some of the interesting stories you have read.
pg112-p5-s5:

you think he will be shy of a spiritual remedy, ask him to look at the chapter on
pg112-p5:
The chances are he would. Show him your copy of this book and tell him what you have found out about alcoholism. Show
him that as alcoholics, the writers of the book understand. Tell him some of the interesting stories you have read. If
you think he will be shy of a spiritual remedy, ask him to look at the chapter on
